2026-04-10T17:45:14.3001037Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3007604Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3012135Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3013952Z 
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3014787Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3021095Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3022152Z 
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3022615Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3023764Z 
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3025038Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3025729Z 
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3064188Z   git switch -
2026-04-10T17:45:14.3064726Z
